debug_info.goal:
tab : Table
tab_valid : tab.Valid
row : Row
row_valid : Valid tab row
y : ValidSplit tab row
⊢ ¬∃ q ∈ row.toPoseInterval, RupertPose q nopert.hull

verification_message: All 1 attempts failed (1 strategies x 1 attempts each)
proof_attempts:
by
    intro h
    rcases h with ⟨q, hq, hr⟩
    -- Extract the relevant information from the hypothesis
    have h₁ := hr
    -- Use the fact that the hull is not Rupert to derive a contradiction
    have h₂ := y.not_rupert q
    -- Use the fact that q is in the pose interval to get the necessary bounds
    have h₃ : q ∈ row.toPoseInterval := hq
    -- Simplify the hypothesis to get the contradiction
    simp_all [Solution.Row.toPoseInterval]
    <;>
    (try norm_num at *) <;>
    (try linarith) <;>
    (try contradiction) <;>
    (try nlinarith)
  <;>
  (try simp_all) <;>
  (try norm_num at *) <;>
  (try linarith) <;>
  (try contradiction) <;>
  (try nlinarith)
